headline: Broadridge Announces Closing of $500 Million Senior Notes Offering
summary: Broadridge Financial Solutions, Inc. (NYSE: BR) ("Broadridge") today announced the closing of its offering of $500 million aggregate principal amount of 5.750% senior notes due 2036 (the "Notes"). As previously announced, Broadridge intends to use the net proceeds of this offering, together with cash on hand, to repay its outstanding 3.400% senior notes due 2026.

headline: Top Stock Reports for Costco, Coca-Cola & AstraZeneca
summary: Costco, Coca-Cola and AstraZeneca lead Zacks' top stock reports as strong earnings, growth drivers and pipeline momentum lift outlooks.
